rulings.Case Title: GEORGE RAYMOND SCOTT ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NA. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for MAR-09-2018 Line 6. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., SUCCESSOR BY MERGER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Demurrer based on preemption is overruled. Demurrer to cause of action for violation of CC 2924c is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a cause of action to challenge the amount claimed exists under this statute. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of implied covenant is sustained with leave to amend to allege a contract in existence at the time of the breach. Hearing required to address the doctrine of continuing violation and/or continuous accrual. = (501/GD)

rulings.Case Title: PARK PRESIDIO UNITED METHODIST CHURCH VS. ELLEN BROTHERTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 9, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT ELLEN BROTHERTON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. No argument or evidence presented that tenancy at issue in this action is subject to SFRO. = (501/GD)

rulings.Case Title: LONNA DESSMAN VS. NOLAN DESSMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 9, 2018 line 9. DEFENDANT NOLAN DESSMAN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clarify whether the Premises at issue in this action (possession of which is being sought) is solely a "garage" at 117 Hahn Street or Plaintiff is seeking to recover possession of a owner occupied single family dwelling, i.e. is Defendant in possession solely of the garage space/unit or is also in possession of/has access to common areas such as kitchen, bathroom, etc. Demurer is otherwise overruled. = (501/GD)
